title: Ashfall Fossil Beds preserves 12-million-year-old animals buried by supervolcano
description: A park in northeast Nebraska offers visitors a chance to see 12-million-year-old fossils exactly where they were found, with excavations still underway.

title: The ancient plant of rivercane makes a comeback for flood control
description: To prevent flooding, people in Western North Carolina are turning to a traditional basket weaving ingredient.
